overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character in a Gryffindor jacket exploring a snowy castle environment. The character transitions from an exterior courtyard into a grand gothic interior with moving staircases, ascends multiple levels while passing other students, and exits onto a snowy bridge connecting castle wings. The atmosphere is cold and dim with falling snow and blue-purple lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered castle courtyard with gothic architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy courtyard toward a large wooden entrance door

entered.detail: tall stone walls with pointed arches and gothic detailing covered in snow
massive wooden door with metal studs and ornate carvings
decorative stone fountain partially covered in snow
cobblestone ground covered in fresh snow with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, snow-covered castle courtyard during blue hour. Gothic stone walls rise on both sides with icicles hanging from the ledges. The camera follows the character as they approach a large wooden entrance door at the far end of the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with moving staircases

events.description: character opens the large wooden doors and enters the castle interior
character begins ascending the grand marble staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand moving staircase while passing other students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the stairs while holding a book

entered.detail: sweeping marble staircase with ornate wooden railings that shift and move
large skeletal display of a dragon or dinosaur on a raised platform
tall polished marble columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
lit wall-mounted torches providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast gothic hall with a grand marble staircase. The space is dimly lit by wall sconces and natural light from high windows. The character ascends the moving stairs, passing a large dinosaur skeleton exhibit on the right and other students moving in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor with stained glass windows

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and exits the building to the exterior

agents.ego_description: navigating the upper hall, passing stained glass windows, and exiting through large doors

notable_agents.action: student descending the stairs in the distance

entered.detail: tall arched window with intricate blue glowing patterns depicting a bearded face
decorative wooden doors with brass handles leading to the exterior
large ferns in decorative planters flanking the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the staircase and explores an upper corridor featuring a magnificent large stained glass window with glowing blue designs. The hall has polished marble floors and walls with ornate moldings. The character proceeds toward and exits through large wooden doors back to the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered elevated bridge connecting castle wings

events.description: character exits the castle onto a snowy elevated bridge walkway

agents.ego_description: walking across the snowy bridge and through the exterior courtyard toward another archway

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrades covered in snow lining both sides of the bridge
pointed stone archway forming the end of the bridge passage
tall spired towers with conical roofs visible in the background
stone ledges with long hanging icicles

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a snow-covered elevated bridge with stone railings on both sides. The bridge connects different wings of the castle, with gothic towers and archways visible ahead. Snow continues to fall as the character walks across the bridge and approaches another covered archway leading deeper into the castle complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a frozen outdoor courtyard into the grand gothic interior of the castle before emerging back into the snowy air. It begins by following a character through a wide, snow-covered courtyard during the blue hour, moving past icicle-laden stone walls toward a large wooden entrance. As the character steps inside, the scene shifts into a vast, dimly lit hall where the camera ascends moving marble staircases past a dinosaur skeleton and other students. The movement then flows into an upper corridor illuminated by a glowing blue stained glass window and polished marble floors before proceeding through another set of wooden doors. Finally, the camera emerges back outdoors onto an elevated, snow-covered bridge with stone railings, moving toward distant gothic towers and a covered archway as snow continues to fall.
